faqs.question: Are hornets dangerous to my Elizabeth property?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets can be very dangerous as they aggressively defend their nests and can sting multiple times. Unlike bees, hornets can become particularly aggressive near high-traffic areas in Elizabeth neighborhoods, posing serious risks to children, pets, and anyone with allergies.
